title: Download Multiple Files in the Updates Files Area, But Only Selected Files

posts.author: ktomasko (Kristyn Tomasko)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for a way to be able to select multiple files in the Updates section of an item. there is an option to download all as a zip, or one at a time.
Example: we had a user upload 50 files last week, then another 30 this week. The user downloaded last weeks files as a zip, then renamed those files. When the additional 30 came in, his only options were to download 30 files individually, or all 80 files as a zip and comb through to determine which he needed to keep or delete. If there were check boxes next to each file, the user could select multiple files and then choose from available options.
Does something like this exist?
